title: Abhiraj Bambhore — AI Engineer & Founder of MirageX
content: Abhiraj Bambhore is an AI Engineer and Computer Science student at REVA University (Nov 2023 – Nov 2027) with a CGPA of 9.62. He is the Founder & CEO of MirageX, a startup pioneering autonomous decentralized energy orchestration. His expertise lies in Agentic AI, NLP, and distributed systems, with a focus on building high-impact, scalable solutions using Python, AWS Cloud, and LangGraph. LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/abhiraj-bambhore-a104aa298 | Portfolio: abhirajbambhore.com | Email: abhirajbambhore@gmail.com | Phone: +91 9611941155.

title: Abhiraj Bambhore — Technical Skills & Arsenal
content: Technical Stack: Python, C++, Java, SQL. Frameworks: LangChain, LangGraph, Scikit-learn, FastAPI, XGBoost, Pydantic, Pandas, NumPy. Systems: Agentic AI, LLM Pipelines, Docker, AWS Cloud, Informatica Cloud (ETL). Tools: Antigravity, n8n, Jenkins, Git, GitHub, VS Code, Supabase, MCP (Model Context Protocol), CrewAI.

title: Abhiraj Bambhore — Major Projects & Missions
content: MirageX: Autonomous peer-to-peer energy orchestration via multi-agent systems (AutoGen, Ollama, Sentinel-2). NeuroVoice AI: Parkinson's screening via vocal biomarkers (React 19, FastAPI, XGBoost). Internship Recommendation Engine: 87% match accuracy for 10,000+ listings. SIH 2025: Smart Crop Advisory for 25+ crops with multilingual voice AI.

title: Abhiraj Bambhore — Certifications & Education
content: Education: B.Tech CSE at REVA University (2023–2027), CGPA 9.62. Certifications: Agentic AI (Building AI Agents with LangGraph/CrewAI/MCP - 2026), AWS Cloud Practitioner (2026), DevOps Certification (Mevi Technology), JPMorganChase Software Engineering Job Simulation (2026).
